attributes.description: Single node deep dive with memory decomposition, working set utilization, network I/O, and eviction risk thresholds.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name), name = MAX(k8s.node.name)
| EVAL name = CASE(count == 1, name, CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " nodes"))
| KEEP name

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS name = MAX(k8s.node.name)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name), ready = MAX(k8s.node.condition_ready)
| EVAL ready = CASE(
    count > 1, "N/A",
    ready == 1, "Ready",
    "Not Ready"
  )
| KEEP ready

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name), ready = MAX(k8s.node.condition_ready)
| EVAL ready = CASE(
    count > 1, "N/A",
    ready == 1, "Ready",
    "Not Ready"
  )
| KEEP ready

embeddableConfig.description: Node condition: Ready or Not Ready.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name), created = MIN(@timestamp)
| EVAL created_str = CASE(count == 1, DATE_FORMAT("MMM dd, yyyy", created), "N/A")
| KEEP created_str

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name), created = MIN(@timestamp)
| EVAL created_str = CASE(count == 1, DATE_FORMAT("MMM dd, yyyy", created), "N/A")
| KEEP created_str

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.node.name
| LIMIT 1

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.node.name
| LIMIT 1

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(allocatable_cpu)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(allocatable_cpu)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS disk_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_disk = SUM(disk_cap)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS disk_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_disk = SUM(disk_cap)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_memory = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_memory = SUM(allocatable_memory)

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.allocatable_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS allocatable_memory = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory) BY k8s.node.name
| STATS total_memory = SUM(allocatable_memory)

FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage), alloc_cpu = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  | EVAL cpu_util = ROUND(cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, 4)
  | KEEP cpu_util

FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage), alloc_cpu = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  | EVAL cpu_util = ROUND(cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, 4)
  | KEEP cpu_util

embeddableConfig.description: Average node CPU usage / average allocatable CPU.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS fs_usage = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage), fs_cap = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
  | EVAL disk_util = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap), 4)
  | KEEP disk_util

FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS fs_usage = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage), fs_cap = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
  | EVAL disk_util = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap), 4)
  | KEEP disk_util

embeddableConfig.description: Average node disk usage / average disk capacity.
embeddableConfig.title: Disk utilization

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS mem_ws = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set), alloc_mem = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
  | EVAL mem_util = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), 4)
  | KEEP mem_util

FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS mem_ws = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set), alloc_mem = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
  | EVAL mem_util = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), 4)
  | KEEP mem_util

embeddableConfig.description: Average node memory working set / average allocatable memory.
embeddableConfig.title: Memory working set utilization

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS mem_used = MAX(k8s.node.memory.working_set), alloc_mem = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
    BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP @timestamp, mem_used, alloc_mem

FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS mem_used = MAX(k8s.node.memory.working_set), alloc_mem = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
    BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP @timestamp, mem_used, alloc_mem

embeddableConfig.description: Memory working set over time with allocatable ceiling. sum(k8s.node.memory.working_set) as area.
embeddableConfig.title: Memory working set vs allocatable

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS cpu_used = MAX(k8s.node.cpu.usage), alloc_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
    BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP @timestamp, cpu_used, alloc_cpu

FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS cpu_used = MAX(k8s.node.cpu.usage), alloc_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
    BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP @timestamp, cpu_used, alloc_cpu

embeddableConfig.description: CPU usage over time with allocatable ceiling. sum(k8s.node.cpu.usage) as area, reference line at allocatable.
embeddableConfig.title: CPU usage vs allocatable

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS disk_used = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage), disk_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
    BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP @timestamp, disk_used, disk_cap

FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS disk_used = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage), disk_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)
    BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP @timestamp, disk_used, disk_cap

embeddableConfig.description: Disk usage over time with capacity ceiling.
embeddableConfig.title: Disk usage vs capacity

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS pod_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)
    BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP @timestamp, pod_count

FROM metrics-*
  | WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS pod_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)
    BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
  | KEEP @timestamp, pod_count

embeddableConfig.description: Number of pods running over time.
embeddableConfig.title: Pod count over time

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    rss = SUM(k8s.node.memory.rss),
    working_set = SUM(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    available = SUM(k8s.node.memory.available)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute)
| KEEP timestamp, rss, working_set, available

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    rss = SUM(k8s.node.memory.rss),
    working_set = SUM(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    available = SUM(k8s.node.memory.available)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute)
| KEEP timestamp, rss, working_set, available

embeddableConfig.description: Memory composition over time. RSS, working set, and available memory as separate series. SUM per 1m bucket.
embeddableConfig.title: Memory composition

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.network.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    network_bytes = SUM(RATE(k8s.node.network.io))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute), direction
| EVAL direction = CASE(direction == "receive", "Network In", direction == "transmit", "Network Out", direction)
| KEEP timestamp, direction, network_bytes

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.network.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    network_bytes = SUM(RATE(k8s.node.network.io))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(1 minute), direction
| EVAL direction = CASE(direction == "receive", "Network In", direction == "transmit", "Network Out", direction)
| KEEP timestamp, direction, network_bytes

embeddableConfig.description: Network I/O over time by direction (transmit/receive). SUM(RATE(k8s.node.network.io)) per 1m bucket.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.name) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.name) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.name) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 1

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.name) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 1

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.name) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 4

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.name) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 4

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.name) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 3

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.name) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 3

FROM metrics-*
    | WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      phase = MAX(k8s.pod.phase),
      containers = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.container.name),
      restarts = SUM(k8s.container.restarts),
      cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
      mem_ws = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set)
    BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.namespace.name
  | KEEP k8s.pod.name, k8s.namespace.name, phase, containers, restarts, cpu_usage, mem_ws
  | SORT k8s.pod.name ASC

FROM metrics-*
    | WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      phase = MAX(k8s.pod.phase),
      containers = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.container.name),
      restarts = SUM(k8s.container.restarts),
      cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
      mem_ws = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set)
    BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.namespace.name
  | KEEP k8s.pod.name, k8s.namespace.name, phase, containers, restarts, cpu_usage, mem_ws
  | SORT k8s.pod.name ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Pods on this node with phase, container count, restarts, CPU usage, and memory working set. Drills down to Pod Detail.
embeddableConfig.title: Pods

attributes.title: [OTEL][Kubernetes] Node Detail
